overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting the interior of a cozy medieval tavern or inn common room with stone walls and wooden beams. The space is illuminated by a large fireplace and warm lamps, featuring a translucent ghostly figure near the hearth and scattered furniture. The atmosphere is warm and intimate with high-quality lighting and textures typical of modern fantasy games.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern common room with stone fireplace and upper balcony

events.description: translucent ghostly figure near fireplace shifts position and opacity slightly
character in dark robes enters from the right side and walks toward the seating area

agents.ego_description: standing still in the tavern common room, observing the warm interior and the supernatural apparition near the fireplace

notable_agents.action: translucent blue ghostly figure standing near the fireplace, flickering and shifting slightly
person sitting in leather armchair near the standing lamp, remaining stationary

entered.detail: large stone hearth with burning fire and carved wooden mantelpiece
ornate brass pendant lamp with warm glow hanging from ceiling beams
upholstered armchair with wooden frame positioned near the lamp
large woven rug covering the wooden floor in the seating area
thick curved wooden support beams forming the vaulted ceiling structure
wooden balustrade of the upper level overlooking the common room

segments.scene_description: The camera observes a cozy medieval tavern interior with a roaring stone fireplace on the left and warm lamplight illuminating the seating area. A translucent ghostly figure flickers near the hearth while a patron sits in a leather armchair to the right. The space features wooden ceiling beams, an upper balcony, and scattered potted plants. Midway through the clip, a character enters from the right, adding subtle movement to the otherwise static scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy medieval tavern that shifts from a quiet, atmospheric observation to a lived-in space. It begins by focusing on a roaring stone fireplace on the left and the warm lamplight illuminating a seating area where a patron rests in a leather armchair. As the camera lingers, the ethereal presence of a translucent ghostly figure flickers near the hearth, contrasting with the solid wooden ceiling beams and the upper balcony above. The scene then expands to include scattered potted plants and the depth of the common room before a character enters from the right, introducing a sense of active life into the intimate environment.
